inputs.userGoal: Deploy an event-driven serverless data pipeline in Azure
subGoals: Cost-optimized: user chose defaults, prefer consumption/serverless tiers
Single-region: eastus, no multi-region complexity for initial deployment

reasoning.whyChosen: Cheapest durable blob storage for raw data; satisfies WAF-Cost and WAF-Reliability.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Data Lake gives hierarchical namespace but costs ~15-20 % more.

resources.name: functionIngest

reasoning.whyChosen: Event-driven, auto-scaling compute; hits WAF-Flexibility and WAF-Ops-Simplicity.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Functions have cold-start latency; mitigated with premium plan.

resources.dependencyReasoning: Ingest function writes raw payloads into Storage.

overallReasoning.summary: This combo minimises cost while preserving elasticity and modularity. Missing: monitoring layer (e.g., App Insights) and RBAC-scoped Key Vault for secrets.
overallReasoning.tradeoffs: Prioritised cost and simplicity over advanced features. Could add VNET integration for security, but not required for this use case.

plan.validation: Storage Account and Function App both deployed to eastus for low-latency blob triggers. Function uses system-assigned identity for secure storage access.
